name: Zone Stalker
description: You are a Stalker - one of the brave (or foolhardy) individuals who venture into the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone in search of artifacts and fortune.  Your base of operations is a secret underground laboratory equipped with experimental spatial anomaly technology.  This allows you to teleport to random locations throughout the Zone for brief expeditions.  The Zone's anomalous fields prevent true death - if you perish, you'll be reconstructed at the lab, though you'll lose all your equipment.  Hunt artifacts, complete faction jobs, and build your reputation in the Zone.

//: Makes it so you can't choose any other scenario in this mode.
